records.question: Which artists named Vijay Singh have exhibitions with ticket prices of at least 16.95?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.artist_id = exhibition.artist_id
WHERE exhibition.ticket_price >= 16.95 AND artist.name = 'Vijay Singh'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.Artist_ID = exhibition.Artist_ID
WHERE artist.Name = 'Vijay Singh' AND exhibition.Ticket_Price >= 16.95

records.question: Which artists are at most 50 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
WHERE artist.age <= 50
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
WHERE artist.Age <= 50

records.question: Which artists named Jeff Sluman from the United States exhibited work in 2006?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.artist_id = exhibition.artist_id
WHERE artist.name = 'Jeff Sluman' AND exhibition.year = 2006 AND artist.country = 'United States'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.Artist_ID = exhibition.Artist_ID
WHERE artist.Name = 'Jeff Sluman'
  AND artist.Country = 'United States'
  AND exhibition.Year = 2006

records.question: Which artists who joined in 1994 or later have participated in exhibitions with the theme Spring held in 2008 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.artist_id = exhibition.artist_id
WHERE exhibition.theme = 'Spring' AND artist.year_join >= 1994 AND exhibition.year <= 2008
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.Artist_ID = exhibition.Artist_ID
WHERE artist.Year_Join >= 1994
  AND exhibition.Theme = 'Spring'
  AND exhibition.Year <= 2008

records.question: Which artists joined in 1996 and are from the United States?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
WHERE artist.country = 'United States' AND artist.year_join = 1996
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
WHERE artist.Year_Join = 1996 AND artist.Country = 'United States'

records.question: Who are the artists that have participated in exhibitions from 2009 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.artist_id = exhibition.artist_id
WHERE exhibition.year >= 2009
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
WHERE artist.Artist_ID IN (
    SELECT exhibition.Artist_ID
    FROM exhibition
    WHERE exhibition.Year >= 2009
)

records.question: Who is Jeff Sluman from the United States that joined in 1988 or later and is at most 57 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
WHERE artist.age <= 57 AND artist.country = 'United States' AND artist.name = 'Jeff Sluman' AND artist.year_join >= 1988
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
WHERE Name = 'Jeff Sluman'
  AND Country = 'United States'
  AND Year_Join >= 1988
  AND Age <= 57

records.question: Which artists named Paul Azinger, aged 47 and who joined in 1993 or earlier, had exhibitions with the Summer theme in 2009 that charged ticket prices at most 9.95?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.artist_id = exhibition.artist_id
WHERE exhibition.theme = 'Summer' AND exhibition.ticket_price <= 9.95 AND exhibition.year = 2009 AND artist.name = 'Paul Azinger' AND artist.year_join <= 1993 AND artist.age = 47
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.Artist_ID = exhibition.Artist_ID
WHERE artist.Name = 'Paul Azinger'
  AND artist.Age = 47
  AND artist.Year_Join <= 1993
  AND exhibition.Theme = 'Summer'
  AND exhibition.Year = 2009
  AND exhibition.Ticket_Price <= 9.95

records.question: Which artists named Vijay Singh from Fiji, aged at least 45 and who joined in 1998 or later, have exhibitions where the theme is Christmas Tree and the ticket price is at least 16.95?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.artist_id = exhibition.artist_id
WHERE artist.age >= 45 AND exhibition.theme = 'Christmas Tree' AND artist.year_join >= 1998 AND artist.name = 'Vijay Singh' AND exhibition.ticket_price >= 16.95 AND artist.country = 'Fiji'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT artist.Artist_ID
FROM artist
JOIN exhibition ON artist.Artist_ID = exhibition.Artist_ID
WHERE artist.Name = 'Vijay Singh'
  AND artist.Country = 'Fiji'
  AND artist.Age >= 45
  AND artist.Year_Join >= 1998
  AND exhibition.Theme = 'Christmas Tree'
  AND exhibition.Ticket_Price >= 16.95
